text:
quarantine, epidemiological intervention of restriction on the movement of people and goods, which is intended to prevent the spread of infectious disease or pests, also known as Kontumaz, Contumaz. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "Quarantine"
- described by source: "The Nuttall Encyclopædia (subject named as: Quarantine)",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- name in kana: "けんえき"
- instance of: "public health intervention"
- subclass of: "regulation",
 "social distancing"
- facet of: "emergency management"
- on focus list of Wikimedia project: "WikiProject COVID-19",
 "WikiProject Medicine"
